title: Repository Record
description: A repository record stored in repositories/<assignment-id>/<login>.json within a PXL Classroom control repository.

assignment_id.description: ID of the assignment this repository belongs to.

github_login.description: GitHub username of the repository owner (student).

repo_name.description: Full repository name in org/repo format.

repo_url.description: HTML URL of the repository on GitHub.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the repository was created.

provisioned_by_run.description: URL of the workflow run that provisioned this repository.

student_permission.description: Permission level granted to the student on this repository.

access_state.description: Current state of the student's access to the repository.

last_checked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last access-state check.
